evidence: Reviewed exact district leaves remain limited to 3 saved pages; that is not enough to truthfully prove county-grade district routing across all 58 California counties.

The reviewed CDSS IHSS county directory https://www.cdss.ca.gov/inforesources/county-ihss-offices is live and lists county-specific links, but the packet still verifies only sample county-owned office leaves plus BenefitsCal, not statewide reviewed county-grade office coverage.

Reviewed first-party Matrix Parents evidence on https://www.matrixparents.org/ preserves explicit PTI/FEC/FRC designation text, but the same page limits PTI service coverage to Marin, Napa, Solano, and Sonoma Counties rather than statewide California coverage.
